title: 开源鸿蒙开发者大会2026成功举办 产学研协同共探智能操作系统未来
content: 5月28日，开源鸿蒙开发者大会2026（OHDC.2026，以下简称“大会”）在广州隆重开幕。本次大会由开源鸿蒙项目群工作委员会主办，广东省工业和信息化厅、广州市工业和信息化局、黄埔区工业和信息化局指导支持，科学城数科集团·广东省开源鸿蒙适配中心、佳都科技集团股份有限公司承办。…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 开源科技

title: [开源] 《织经》—— Claude Code Workflows 深度剖析， 29 章实战手册
content:
「经之以天，纬之以地。」—— 《左传·昭公二十八年》 两千年前，织工以经线为骨、纬线为肉，一梭一梭织就锦缎。经，是结构——纵贯始终、张紧不移；纬，是功能——穿梭其间、变化万千。

今天，编排 AI Agent 亦复如是：meta 与 phase 是「经」——确定性的结构骨架，预先张紧…

title: 用 AI 写生成长期运行的软件
content: Research on AI-generated long-running software introduces a meta-engineering harness with a seven-layer architecture for autonomous software development. Key components include structured contracts (Layer 3) that define API specifications and invariants, specialized AI roles—Builder, Verifier, Reviewer, and Arbiter (Layer 2)—and a seven-step pipeline where implementation and testing agents work from identical contracts. A Retro agent reviews historical failures for system improvement. Challenges include contract incompleteness, shared model blind spots between agents, human bottlenecks in governance decisions, context drift over time, verification coverage gaps, and cost constraints. Human engineers oversee final approval.
eventKey: 写生成长期运行的软件
normalizedTitle: 用 ai 写生成长期运行的软件

title: 深度用好 Codex：从代码助手到电脑工作流控制台
content: 大多数开发者最初使用编程智能体时，场景无外乎代码生成：检查仓库、改动文件、跑测试、开 Pull Request。这是 Codex 最初的重心，也是它最被熟知的形态。但计算机上的大量工作早已由代码介导——执行 Shell 命令、浏览网页、调用 API、导出文档、响应事件、触发自动化…

title: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
content: MOSS-TTS Family is an open-source speech and sound generation model suite developed by MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It supports high-fidelity, expressive audio generation including long-form speech, multi-speaker dialogue, voice design, sound effects, and real-time streaming text-to-speech. The Python repository has 2,011 stars and 202 forks.

title: 我开源了一个项目：把任何资料，安全的变成 AI 的上下文
content: A developer open-sourced AnyToContext, a tool that securely converts selected code and documents into AI queryable knowledge bases. Unlike RAG systems, it uses a file-based approach better suited for complex business code retrieval. Users can query via web interface or agent-to-agent communication. The project addresses the need to share partial codebases while protecting sensitive sections, combining code with product documentation for optimal results.

title: Stablecoins, AI Agents, and The Future of Global Banking
content: In an a16z interview, Jeeves CEO Dileep Thazhmon discusses building a global financial system for Latin American enterprises using stablecoins and AI. The conversation addresses challenges across 25 countries including regulation, payments, underwriting, and compliance. Stablecoin adoption is accelerating in the region, while AI helps Jeeves scale billions in payment volume through automated underwriting, customer support, reconciliation, and KYB workflows.

title: 散户：坚决不接科技股的盘
content: Retail investors are refusing to buy into China's tech stock rally in 2026 despite aggressive institutional efforts to lure them. Having learned from past losses—81% lost money in 2025, averaging 21,000 yuan—they recognize manipulation tactics like inflated price-to-earnings ratios. They face disadvantages against quant trading, which comprises over 40% of volume with 0.3 millisecond latency, and operate under T+1 settlement rules. With tech valuations skyrocketing, retail investors choose inaction over risk, leaving institutions trapped: continuing to pump prices raises costs, while selling causes collapse. Their survival strategy is minimizing losses by refusing to participate.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 元健老康估值分析
eventKey: 坚决不接科技股的盘
normalizedTitle: 散户 坚决不接科技股的盘

title: 一文说清楚双驱动的软件架构
content: 大部分文献认为架构风格相比架构模式，是一种层次更高的系统构建方法，并主要面向系统设计人员和客户的术语。我认为架构风格是一种相对于从单体系统发展起来的架构模式，满足更多架构质量属性的，并从高层次指导如何构建一个系统的解决方案。我认为过于区分架构风格和架构模式没有意义。
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖

title: 小龙虾彻底凉了？清华团队连夜开源Agent神器，Token成本狂降70%
content: Tsinghua's THUNLP lab and partners have open-sourced PilotDeck, an agent operating system addressing limitations of earlier tools like OpenClaw. Key features include: WorkSpace "pods" with truly isolated file systems, memories, and skills rather than folder-based separation; white-box editable Project Memory and Collaboration Feedback with automatic Dream consolidation and rollback; and intelligent sub-agent level model routing that reduces token costs by 70% while maintaining or improving quality. PilotDeck supports local model deployment for privacy, auto-provisions tools like VoxCPM for specific tasks, and allows custom routing rules via natural language.
eventKey: 小龙虾彻底凉了-清华团队连夜开源agent神器-token成本狂降70

title: 巨额补贴流向谷歌，当地民众用水却受限：印度AI时代的两难现实
content: India's AI ambitions face a stark dilemma: the city of Visakhapatnam attracted a Google data center with massive subsidies, but residents now suffer severe water restrictions. The facility consumes enormous resources while locals lack basic needs. This exemplifies a broader pattern where developing nations offer billion-dollar incentives to U.S. tech companies for data centers, with citizens bearing the environmental and social costs of this digital infrastructure expansion.

title: Uber 总裁质疑 AI 投入合理性：四个月花光全年 AI 预算
content: Uber exhausted its entire 2026 AI budget in just four months, prompting executives to question whether the spending yields meaningful returns. President Andrew Macdonald noted no clear link between increased Claude Code token usage and improved user-facing features. Uber's R&D spending reached $3.4 billion in 2025, up 9% year-over-year. Macdonald stated the company must weigh token costs and headcount against provable delivery of useful services to users.

title: Process financial documents using Amazon Bedrock Data Automation
content: Amazon Bedrock Data Automation (BDA) extracts structured data from complex financial documents using custom blueprints. It overcomes limitations of traditional OCR by leveraging foundation models to understand document context, recognize relationships between sections, and validate information across sources. The system was tested on four document types: bank statements, W-2 forms, 1099-B tax forms, and vendor contracts. For each, custom blueprints defined specific fields and validation rules, producing accurate structured outputs in JSON or CSV formats. BDA offers visual grounding with confidence scores and built-in hallucination mitigation.
eventKey: process-financial-documents-using-amazon-bedrock
normalizedTitle: process financial documents using amazon bedrock data automation

title: Building AI agents for business support using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
content: AWS GenAIIC collaborated with Works Human Intelligence to build two AI agents using Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for their HR system "COMPANY." The Commuting Allowance Agent automates allowance approvals, migrating from a monolithic ECS setup to AgentCore Runtime with multi-tenancy via DynamoDB and Cognito. The Browser Operation Agent performs HR system tasks using Strands Agents with fast playwright for browser automation. Key optimizations included prompt caching, model switching from Claude Sonnet to Haiku, and behavior improvements, achieving up to 97% cost reduction per process while handling complex, flexible workflows.
eventKey: building-agents-business-support-using-amazon
normalizedTitle: building ai agents for business support using amazon bedrock agentcore

title: From data overload to actionable insights: How Verizon Connect scaled agentic AI to 100,000 users
content: Verizon Connect deployed agentic AI to convert massive fleet data into actionable insights for 100,000 daily users. Their architecture uses AWS Step Functions and Lambda for serverless anomaly detection across 500 million daily data points, then employs Strands AI agents running in parallel to investigate anomalies dynamically. A two-stage process aggregates anomalies and generates detailed investigations autonomously. The system uses Amazon Bedrock-hosted LLMs, with cost optimization reducing token expenses by 70% through Amazon Nova 2 Lite. Insights appear in the Reveal application, delivering natural-language narratives on safety, efficiency, and performance patterns to fleet managers each morning.
eventKey: data-overload-actionable-insights-how-verizon
normalizedTitle: from data overload to actionable insights how verizon connect scaled agentic ai to 100 000 users
